title: coreopsis ferreyrae
intro: Coreopsis ferreyrae, also known as Peruvian coreopsis, is a plant species belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Coreopsis ferreyrae is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to limited scientific research.
